name: greenthumb
description: Local-first financial modeling engine with a React/shadcn UI, AdonisJS backend, Electron desktop app, and an MCP server — one core engine as the single source of truth.
author: Sam Crane

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @greenthumb/core build && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "pnpm dev:api" "pnpm dev:web"
scripts.clean: pnpm -r exec rm -rf node_modules dist build && rm -rf node_modules

pnpm.//: Fetch native bindings (e.g. rolldown) for both mac arches + linux so a Rosetta/x64 or CI runtime still resolves them. NOTE: from-source native modules (better-sqlite3) still build only for the install host arch — run native arm64 Node on Apple Silicon.
